home.tagline: The NEW media industry meeting point
home.subtitle: Two professional days dedicated to the radio, podcast, video and digital media ecosystem.
home.reassureTitle: A platform built for media professionals
home.reassureBody: Quick double-opt-in registration, GDPR-compliant. Your data stays in France.

step1.heading: Registration — step 1 of 2
step1.subheading: Two minutes: we identify you, send a confirmation email, then we build your offer together.

rebound.expired: Your confirmation link has expired or has been replaced by a newer one. Please start the registration over below.
rebound.invalid: The link you followed is invalid. Please start the registration over below.
rebound.notfound: Registration not found. Please start over below.
rebound.error: An error occurred — please start the registration over.

noscript.message: JavaScript is required to complete your registration. Please enable JavaScript in your browser or contact philippe@mediadays.solutions.

step1.labelAffiliateInputPlaceholder: Name of the company or contact who told you about the event
step1.categorySponsorIntro: Sponsor the event without a booth: Gold/Silver/Bronze logo, naming rights, sponsored emailing, lanyard, badge…

vat.sectionHelp: If your company is based in another EU country and registered for VAT, enter your intra-community VAT number to qualify for reverse charge (Article 196 of Directive 2006/112/EC).
vat.autoliquidationInfo: ✓ Reverse-charge VAT applies — your quote will be issued excluding VAT (Article 196).
vat.standardInfo: French 20% VAT will apply to your quote.
vat.errorNotValid: VAT number not recognised by VIES. Check the entry.
vat.errorViesUnavailable: VIES service unavailable. Please try again in a few minutes.
vat.errorRateLimited: Too many attempts. Please wait a few minutes.
vat.errorMissingFields: Select an EU country and enter a number before verifying.

step1.consentRgpd: I have read and accept the <link>privacy policy</link> and terms of use of MediaDays Solutions.
step1.consentMarketing: I agree to receive commercial communications from MediaDays Solutions and Editions HF (newsletter, events, offers). I can unsubscribe at any time.

tooltips.emailBody: Please use your work email address. Avoid personal Gmail, Hotmail or Yahoo addresses: we verify that your email is linked to your business activity to ensure quality registrations and prevent duplicates.
tooltips.categoryBody: Partner: company offering audio, radio, podcast products/services (sales houses, service providers, studios, equipment manufacturers…) that wants a physical booth at Paris Radio Show 2026 on December 15, 2026 at Carrousel du Louvre. Sponsor: company wishing to support the event without a booth (Gold/Silver/Bronze logo, naming rights, sponsored emailing, lanyard, badge…).
tooltips.affiliateBody: If a company, sales house or contact told you about MediaDays Solutions, mention their name here. Optional.

checkEmail.heading: Check your inbox
checkEmail.body: We just sent you an email to confirm your address. Click the link in the email to move on to step 2.
checkEmail.spamHint: Don't forget to check your spam folder (and add philippe@mediadays.solutions to your contacts for future emails).
checkEmail.resendMaxed: Resend limit reached. Contact us if needed.

expired.heading: Link expired or registration cancelled
expired.body: To restart your registration, please start over from the beginning.

alreadyConverted.heading: Registration already finalized
alreadyConverted.body: Your file is being processed by our team. We will get back to you within 48 business hours.

caseA.heading: Welcome {firstName}!
caseA.subheading: As a Paris Radio Show partner, here is your dedicated offer:
caseA.salonParis: Paris Radio Show — December 15, 2026 (Carrousel du Louvre)
caseA.salonParisIncluded: Main show, included in the pack
caseA.salonMarseilleAdd: Add the Marseille day (+€{price} excl. VAT)
caseA.salonMarseilleUnavailable: Marseille unavailable for this pack — contact philippe@mediadays.solutions
caseA.boothPreferencesLegend: Pick your 3 preferred booths (look at the plan above)
caseA.boothPreferencesHelp: Final assignment will be confirmed by our team within 48h after payment. Booths are assigned in registration order.
caseA.boothPaceCanva: Browse the floor plan below, then pick your 3 preferred booths.
caseA.paymentDevisSepaDesc: Receive a Sellsy quote by email. Payment by wire upon receipt.
caseA.paymentDevisAcompteStripeDesc: Receive a quote + secure payment link for the deposit.
caseA.paymentProformaAcompteDesc: Receive a pro-forma invoice to be paid in full at deposit.
caseA.paymentFactureIntegraleDesc: Receive a final invoice to be paid in full.
caseA.summaryVatNote: VAT not applicable (reverse charge outside France).
caseA.cgvAccept: I have read and accept the <link>terms and conditions</link>.
caseA.summaryNoPack: Select a pack to see the total.

caseB.heading: Thank you for your interest, {firstName}!
caseB.subheading: Tell us about your project — our team will get back to you within 48 business hours.
caseB.messagePlaceholder: Describe in a few words your project, constraints, questions…

thankYou.heading: All set!
thankYou.bodyDevisSepa: Your registration has been received. You will receive your quote by email within 48 business hours.
thankYou.bodyStripePending: Your registration has been received. You will receive your secure payment link by email within 48 business hours.
thankYou.bodyCaseB: Your request has been received. Our team will get back to you within 48 business hours to discuss your project.

dashboard.welcome: Track your performance and grab your tracking links and communication assets.

stats.title: 📊 Your statistics
stats.subtitle: Live metrics over the last 30 days and cumulative since activation.
stats.noData: No data yet. Share your tracking link to start.

societes.title: 🏢 My companies
societes.subtitle: Companies attached to your affiliate code (cookie, declared by the company, or declared by you).
societes.empty: No companies attached yet. Share your tracking link or declare a company you reached out to.

declare.modalTitle: Declare a company you reached out to
declare.modalDescription: Fill in the company you reached out to. An admin will validate within 48h.
declare.notesPlaceholder: Ex: reached out at RadioTour Brussels on May 12

exclusion.title: 💡 Important:
exclusion.body: Commissions don't apply to existing Paris Radio Show 2026 partners. Any other company converted through your affiliation generates commission normally.
exclusion.seeListLink: See the list of excluded partners ({count}) →
exclusion.modalDescription: These companies are already PRS 2026 partners and do not generate commission. Any other company converted through your affiliation link remains eligible.

tracking.title: 🔗 Your tracking links
tracking.subtitle: Links to copy into your newsletters, social posts or email signatures. Every click is attributed to your partner code.

paiements.title: 💰 Commission history
paiements.subtitle: Details of each commission earned and paid. Transfers are issued manually by our team within 30 days after validation.
paiements.empty: No commission yet. Your first conversions will show up here.

kit.title: 🎨 Communication kit
kit.subtitle: Your personalized assets to share with your audience: LinkedIn banner, email signature, and copy templates for your campaigns.
kit.b2bNote: Reminder: MediaDays Solutions affiliation is for partners only (tech solutions in audio, video, adtech, OOH, data, broadcasting). Visitors get free entry via mediadays.net and don't generate commission. Focus your outreach on pros who could exhibit.

banner.title: 📥 LinkedIn banner 1200 × 627
banner.help: Personalized PNG image with your name. Ideal for LinkedIn posts or profile cover.

signature.title: ✉️ Email HTML signature
signature.help: HTML snippet to paste in your email client's signature (Gmail, Outlook, Apple Mail). Rendering may vary by client.

emailFr.title: 📨 Email template (FR)
emailFr.help: Template text to send to your French contacts. Replace {prenom} before sending.

emailEn.title: 📨 Email template (EN)
emailEn.help: Template text to send to your English-speaking contacts. Replace {first_name} before sending.

profil.title: 👤 My profile
profil.subtitle: Your affiliate information and bank details for commission payments.

banking.help: This information is strictly confidential. It is only used to pay your commissions by MediaDays Solutions.

noLogoBanner.title: For more impactful visuals, upload your company logo first.
noLogoBanner.description: You can still download these visuals (your company name will appear in place of the logo). If you upload your logo later, all visuals will update automatically.

requestLink.heading: Get your access link
requestLink.subheading: Enter the email address you used to register. You will receive an access link valid for 15 minutes.
requestLink.success: If this email matches a registration, you will receive an email with your access link within a few minutes.

error.rateLimit: Too many requests. Please try again in an hour.
error.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

login.expired: Your access link has expired. Request a new link below.
login.invalid: Invalid access link. Request a new link below.
login.generic: Sign-in failed. Request a new link below.

dashboard.welcome: Welcome to your MediaDays Solutions 2026 portal.

devis.noDevis: Your quote has not been issued yet. Our team will contact you within 48h.

payment.expired: Your payment link has expired. Contact us for a new link.
payment.noPath: No online payment available — please follow the payment instructions on your quote.

booth.label: Booth
booth.notYet: Your booth location will be communicated shortly.

documents.devisNotYet: Your quote has not been issued yet.
documents.invoiceNotYet: Issued after quote signature and payment.

logoUploader.intro: Upload your logo to personalise your social badge and help attendees recognise you.
logoUploader.hint: PNG, JPG, WebP or SVG · Max 5 MB · Prefer PNG for email signatures

error.unauthorized: Session expired. Sign in again via your magic link.
error.invalidType: Unsupported format (PNG, JPG, WebP, SVG only).

badge.intro: Download your personalised badge (1080×1080) to share on LinkedIn, Twitter, Instagram or Facebook to announce your participation.
badge.tipNoLogo: Tip: upload your logo above to get a branded badge (otherwise your company name will be displayed).

linkedinCover.intro: Download your LinkedIn profile banner (1584×396), ready to publish — featuring your logo and the MDS 2026 events announcement.
linkedinCover.tipNoLogo: Tip: upload your logo for a branded banner (otherwise your company name will be displayed).

storyInstagram.intro: Vertical 9:16 format (1080×1920) for Instagram, Facebook, TikTok, Reels.
storyInstagram.tipNoLogo: Tip: upload your logo for a branded story (otherwise your company name will be displayed).

emailSignature.intro: Compact banner (600×120) to embed in your Gmail / Outlook / Apple Mail email signature, announcing your participation on every email you send.
emailSignature.tipNoLogo: Tip: upload your logo for a branded signature (otherwise your company name will be displayed).

zoomBackground.intro: Virtual background (1920×1080) to upload in Zoom or Teams. The bottom banner stays visible behind you during all your calls.
zoomBackground.tipNoLogo: Tip: upload your logo for a branded background (otherwise your company name will be displayed).

wallDisplay.intro: Static visual (1920×1080), readable from a distance, to display on your booth screen during MediaDays Solutions 2026.
wallDisplay.tipNoLogo: Tip: upload your logo for a branded visual (otherwise your company name will be displayed).

invitation.section: 📨 Invite your clients to MediaDays Solutions 2026
invitation.intro: Download your personalised invitation card (1200×800) to share by email, WhatsApp or social media. Every guest who clicks your link is tracked in your dashboard.
invitation.tipNoLogo: Tip: upload your logo for a branded invitation (otherwise your company name will be displayed).
invitation.linkLabel: Link to paste in your email:

slugEditor.label: Customise your invitation link
slugEditor.hint: 3 to 32 characters. Lowercase letters, digits and single dashes only.
slugEditor.errorTooShort: Link must be at least 3 characters.
slugEditor.errorFormat: Invalid format. Use only lowercase letters, digits and single dashes (no leading or trailing dash).
slugEditor.errorTaken: This link is already used by another partner. Try a different variant.

commKit.intro: Download MediaDays Solutions / Paris Radio Show logos and use the official email signature to announce your participation.

errors.generic: An error occurred. Please try again or contact us.
errors.captcha: Anti-spam check failed. Please try again.
errors.emailUndeliverable: This email seems undeliverable. Please check your input or use another work email.
errors.emailFreeProvider: This email looks like a personal address (Gmail, Yahoo, Hotmail, etc.). To validate your professional registration to MediaDays Solutions 2026, please use your company email address.
errors.emailDisposable: This email appears to be a disposable address. Please use a permanent email address to complete your registration.
errors.emailDuplicateRecent: A registration is already in progress for this email. Check your inbox (and spam folder).
errors.emailDuplicateProspect: This email is already linked to an account. Please contact philippe@mediadays.solutions.
errors.rateLimited: Too many attempts. Please wait a few minutes.
errors.consentRgpdRequired: You must accept the privacy policy to continue.

notFound.heading: Page not found
notFound.body: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or has been moved. Please check the URL or go back to the homepage.

styleguide.title: MD visual identity
styleguide.intro: Sanity check of MDS Prospection's colors, typography and shadcn component palette.

polesSection.title: Is MediaDays Solutions for you?
polesSection.subtitle: Click on a hub to discover sub-sectors, partner examples, and the registration path.

visitorsSection.title: Are you a target visitor?
visitorsSection.subtitle: MediaDays Solutions welcomes 14 main visitor categories. Find yours.

etapes.sectionSubtitle: Three events, three cities, one ambition: grow the professional media ecosystem.

form.descriptionInstitutionnel: Industry bodies, federations, professional associations: tell us about your interest in MediaDays Solutions. We'll get back to you within 48h.
form.descriptionEcole: Schools, higher education programs, training organizations: tell us about your access project. We'll get back to you within 48h.
form.descriptionBruxelles: MediaDays Brussels · November 26, 2026 · Mix Brussels. Leave us your details and we'll get back to you with the program and details within 48h.
form.messagePlaceholder: Describe your interest in MediaDays Solutions / your needs
form.toastSuccess: Request submitted — we'll get back to you within 48h.

canva.title: Discover MediaDays in pictures
canva.subtitle: The full presentation of the event.

REGIES_RETAIL_MEDIA.name: MEDIA AGENCIES & RETAIL MEDIA
REGIES_RETAIL_MEDIA.description: Media offering: media agencies, publishers, retailers, creative agencies. Welcomes advertisers and UDECAM agencies (premium visitors).

AUDIO_RADIO.name: AUDIO & RADIO
AUDIO_RADIO.description: Audio solutions sold to radios, platforms and audio media agencies. The heart of Paris Radio Show.

DIFFUSION_INFRA.name: BROADCAST & INFRASTRUCTURE
DIFFUSION_INFRA.description: Cloud, content distribution & transport, FM/DAB+/DTT/5G operators.

VIDEO_CTV.name: VIDEO & CTV
VIDEO_CTV.description: Video distribution, monetization, analytics + pro video production.

OUTDOOR_DOOH.name: OUTDOOR & DOOH
OUTDOOR_DOOH.description: DOOH tech, programmatic outdoor, signage solutions. OOH media agencies (JCDecaux, Clear Channel…) belong to the MEDIA AGENCIES & RETAIL MEDIA hub.

DATA_ADTECH.name: DATA & ADTECH
DATA_ADTECH.description: Adtech, data, measurement, marketing AI, retail media tech. The business heart of MediaDays Solutions.
